stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
Given: Planning data as shown in the Flight Log excerpt (Fuel Planning Section). After a balked landing at the destination airport, you have to divert to the alternate airport with the gear extended. The re-calculated flight time to the alternate due to the reduced speed is 1 h 10 min and the fuel flow will be 900 kg/h. Final Reserve Fuel remains unchanged. What will be the estimated landing mass at the alternate airport?
